disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden onset over 2-3 hours of widespread, intensely itchy raised welts spreading across the torso and limbs
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the rash and when it started?
How quickly did it come on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on really fast — maybe two or three hours ago. It started as itchy raised welts on my tummy and now they're all over my chest, back and arms.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The welts are migratory and transient — individual lesions fade within hours while new ones appear elsewhere; some have a pale centre
trigger_question_examples: Do the individual spots stay put or move around?
How long does any single welt last?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Any one welt seems to settle after a few hours, but then new ones pop up somewhere else. Some of them have a paler bit in the middle.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Mild viral upper respiratory illness about 4 days ago
trigger_question_examples: Have you been unwell recently, like a cold or infection?
Any illnesses in the past week?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had a bit of a cold about four days ago, but it was mild and I'm mostly over it now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No new foods, no insect stings, and no new medications identified as a trigger
trigger_question_examples: Any new foods, medicines, or insect bites before this started?
Have you changed anything you eat, take, or use recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't eaten anything new, no bites or stings, and I haven't started any new medications.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No lip or tongue swelling, no throat tightness, no difficulty breathing or swallowing, no wheeze, no abdominal pain, and no dizziness or faintness
trigger_question_examples: Any swelling of your lips, tongue or throat, or any trouble breathing or swallowing?
Do you feel dizzy, faint, or have any tummy cramps?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my lips and tongue aren't swollen, my throat feels fine, I'm breathing okay with no wheeze, no tummy pain, and I'm not dizzy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Took a standard-dose over-the-counter antihistamine (loratadine 10 mg) about an hour ago with no symptomatic relief
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took one loratadine 10 mg tablet about an hour ago and it hasn't helped at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The itch is severe and causing significant distress; the patient cannot stop scratching
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's driving me crazy — the itch is unbearable and I can't stop scratching. I just want it to stop.
